title: Section 1
content: 1[1. Short title and extent.--(1) This Act may be called the Fatal Accidents Act, 1855. (2) It extends to the whole of India 2***.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 3 of 1951 s. 3 and the Schedule. 2. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 34 of 2019, s. 95 and the Fifth Schedule (w.e.f. 31-10- 2019).
